whpb_20230329_press_gpt-5-2025-08-07.fluency_explanation: The writing is grammatically sound with precise, professional wording and natural flow (e.g., consistent attribution like “Mr. Kirby says…”). whpb_20230329_press_gpt-5-2025-08-07.coherence_explanation: Content is mostly grouped logically under topic-based subheads, but related themes recur in separate sections, creating minor fragmentation. whpb_20230329_press_gpt-5-2025-08-07.tone_explanation: The tone is consistently professional and neutral, relying on attributed reporting (“Ms. Jean-Pierre notes…,” “Mr. Kirby says…”) rather than subjective judgments. It avoids casual or emotional language and maintains appropriate formality for stakeholder review. Mildly evaluative verbs like “touts” or “strongly defending” are limited and contextualized, preserving overall objectivity.
